summary: Added a typed local store — persisted atomically via a uniquely-named temp file plus rename so concurrent CLI invocations cannot silently lose a write — and Cobra address commands for saved delivery addresses.
reason: Rappi usage needs a reusable delivery location with nullable coordinates and an active pointer, which generated profiles cannot model safely; the store is the sole writer of addresses.json, so its writes must be atomic and safe under concurrent invocations.
validated_outcome: Covered by address store and command tests, a concurrent-writers test asserting no torn write or leftover temp file, and isolated-HOME smoke flows.
